title: AI Yearbook 90s
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into an authentic 1990s yearbook portrait.
positive_prompt: Professional 1990s American high school yearbook portrait, authentic vintage school photography, centered head and shoulders composition, studio backdrop with blue and gray gradient, genuine 90s fashion, natural smile, soft flash lighting, slightly warm film tones, Kodak Portra aesthetic, realistic skin texture, nostalgic atmosphere, highly detailed face, clean background, yearbook photo quality, professional portrait photography, timeless school memory, ultra realistic, sharp focus
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, CGI, 3D render, low resolution, blurry, distorted face, asymmetrical eyes, extra fingers, extra limbs, cropped head, modern fashion, futuristic clothing, cyberpunk, text, watermark, logo, overexposed, underexposed, heavy makeup, extreme beauty filter, duplicated features, bad anatomy, noise, artifacts
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. senior portrait, blue laser backdrop...
